problem: AFTER ENGINE START RECEIVED MSG SAYING GDL59 NEEDS SERVICE.
action: RESET GDL59 & RAN FOR SEVERAL HOURS, TESTS GOOD.

problem: STARTER HAS CRACK IN BACK HOUSING.
action: REMOVED & REPLACED STARTER W/ S/N H-R041316.

problem: TOWER INDICATED COMM 2 WAS HARD TO HEAR.
action: DUE TO REPEAT WRITE UP - CHANGED & CONFIGURED GIA #2 S/N 1HQ006705. GIA CANNED FROM N687ND.

problem: RADIOS HAVE A LOT OF STATIC. TURNED OFF STROBE LIGHTS AND STATIC GOES AWAY
action: REMOVED STROBE LIGHT POWER SUPPLY PN: 01-0770006-17 SN 12787 INSTALLED NEW POWER SUPPLY PN 01-0770006-17 SN 11881

problem: ON START, HEARD IT BACKFIRE, THEN HAD TROUBLE STARTING ENGINE. CALLED FOR START ASSIST & IT STARTED RIGHT UP. DIDN'T HAVE PROBLEM UNTIL CLIMBING OUT OF CKN. ENGINE MADE A POP SOUND, RAN ROUGH FOR ABOUT 5 SECS, THEN HAD UNUSUAL VIBRATION TO LANDING.
action: FDM DATA WAS REVIEWED, NO ABNORMAL INDICATIONS NOTED.

problem: DURING PREFLIGHT CK & AFTER ENGINE START; AIRSPEED INDICATOR WAS FLUCTUATING WHILE A/C WAS STATIONARY.

action: TIGHTENED POWER WIRE & JUMPER AT STARTER, CK'ED GOOD.

problem: COMM 1 WAS "SCRAPPY" WHEN TALKING TO TOWER ON BOTH SIDES.
action: TALKED ON COMM 1 FOR A WHILE. NO REPORTS OF IT BEING HARD TO UNDERSTAND. CK'ED AGAINST COMM 2, SOUNDED & OPERATED EXACTLY THE SAME.

problem: RH AFT FUEL HARD LINE AT WING ROOT DAMGAGED
RH AFT FUEL HARD LINE AT WING ROOT DAMGAGED
action: REMOVED HARD LINE FROM AIRCRAFT. REMOVED ADDITIONAL INTERIOR PANELS.
REMOVED SKYTEC STARTER P/N 149-NL/EC SN FNE4412137. INSTALLED NEW SKYTEC STARTER P/N 149NL/EC S/N H-R063586 OPERATIONAL CHECK GOOD NO FURTHER DEFECTS NOTED

problem: STARTED BOLTS ARE LOOSE, NEED NEW STARTER.
action: REMOVED SKYTEC STARTER P/N 149-NL/EC S/N FNE-291221 INSTALLED NEW SKYTEC P/N 149-NL/EC S/N H-R062559 OPERATIONAL CHECK GOOD
REMOVED STARTER S/N: FNE-2912103 INSTALLED SN H-R110884 OPS CHECK GOOD NO FURTHER DEFECTS NOTED
REMOVED & REPLACED STARTER W/ S/N FNER-101603.

problem: ADC/AHRS WOULD NOT ALIGN. ATTEMPTED TO RESTART - NO SUCCESS.

action: RESET GDL59. LOADED CONFIGURATION, MONITORED FOR SEVERAL HOURS. STOPPED & STARTED SYSTEM. CHECKS GOOD.

problem: FRONT HOUSING ON STARTER IS LOOSE
action: INSTALLED NEW STARTER P/N: 149-NL/ER, S/N: H-R110360
REPLACED STARTER IAW CESSNA MAINTENANCE MANUAL 80-10-00. OPS CHECK GOOD. NO FURTHER DEFECTS NOTED. INSTALLED: P/N: 149NL/EC, S/N: H-R121706

problem: AIRCRAFT NEEDS TO BE BUGGED FOR FLYING TEAM PREFLIGHT
WHILE FLYING RECEIVED A RED X ON HSI, LIGHT WOULD RANDOMLY START & STOP WORKING.
action: REMOVED GRS77 S/N 42017164. INSTALLED S/N 42008052. LOADED CORRECT SOFTWARE. OPERATION TESTS GOOD.

problem: WHILE FLYING RECEIVED A RED X ON HSI, LIGHT WOULD RANDOMLY START & STOP WORKING.
STALL WARNING HORN WOULD NOT SOUND WHEN TESTED.
action: COULD NOT DUPLICATE DISCREPANCY. STALL HORN SYSTEM OPS CK GOOD ON GROUND.

problem: HEATER STARTED ON GROUND ON THE SECOND ATTEMPT & SHUT OFF RIGHT AFTER TAKE OFF. HEATER WOULDN'T RESTART.
action: COULD NOT DUPLICATE DISCREP. HEATER OPS CK GOOD AT THIS TIME.

problem: WHEN ADDING POWER, A/C WOULD HESITATE & SPUTTER.
action: NOTICED A/C WAS FLOODED. STARTED A/C, RAN A/C AT DIFFERENT RPMS. PERFORMED GROUND RUN UP, OPS GOOD.
REMOVED OLD FAN. INSTALLED AND TESTED NEW FAN. TEST PASSED. NO FURTHER DEFECTS NOTED.

problem: FUEL FLOW GAUGE DID NOT WORK DURING ENGINE START
action: FABRICATED STANDOFF HOLDER FROM .050 ALUMINUM SECURE CONNECTOR TO STANDOFF TEST FUEL PUMP & FF INDICTION. TEST RAN ENG & CHECK FUEL FLOW INDICATION. NO FURTHER DEFECTS NOTED.
WSHED AIRCRAFT EXT NO FURTHER DEFECTS NOTED.

problem: DURING FLIGHT, COMM 1 AND 2 HAD CONSTANT STATIC PULSE ON ALL FREQUENCIES. NOT HEARD BY OTHER AIRCRAFT. C: 715-797-2186
action: FOUND RH STROBE POWERPACK DEFECTIVE. REMOVED AND REPLACED POWER SUPPLY WITH REPAIRED UNIT. OPS CHECK GOOD. RADIOS ARE CLEAR. NO FURTHER DEFECTS NOTE.

problem: EVERYTHING ON ENGINE INDICATING SYSTEM HAD A RED X ON IT, EXCEPT FUEL IND.
action: INSPECTED POWER UP & STARTED A/C MULTIPLE TIMES, OPS CK'ED GOOD.

problem: STARTER COMING APART, DEFECTIVE REQUIRES CHANGE.
action: REPLACED STARTER IA CESSNA 172 MAINTENANCE MANUAL. NO FURTHER DEFECTS NOTED. PN: 149-NL/EC, SN: H-R121658.

problem: ROUGH ENGINE ON START UP. OIL TEMP STARTED OUT ON COLD THAN SHOT UP TO MAX. PLANE ENGINE WAS HOT WHEN WE STARTED.
action: VERIFIED SOFTWARE CONFIGURATION. PERFORMED ENGINE RUN. FOUND FLUCTUATING OIL TEMP ONLY WHEN ALTERNATOR IS ON AND PRODUCING POWER.

problem: AFTER ENGINE START, STBY ATTITUDE INDICATOR WOULD NOT FULLY ERECT (MEL).
AFTER ENGINE START, STBY ATTITUDE INDICATOR WOULD NOT FULLY ERECT (MEL).
action: REMOVED & REPLACED W/ SERVICEABLE INDICATOR S/N T98967Q. REMOVED & REPLACED COPILOT SEAT FOR INSTALLATION. AMSAFE CHECKS GOOD.
STARTER REMOVED AND REPLACED P/N: INSTALLED, 149NL/EC, S/N: HS050515, OPS CHECK GOOD. NO FURTHER DEFECTS NOTED.

problem: LOUD BANG HEARD ON ENGINE START.
action: RAN UP A/C, NO IRREGULARITIES NOTED.

problem: AVIONICS FAN WOULD NOT REMAIN RUNNING AFTER ENGINE START, UNLESS PRESSURE IS APPLIED TO AVIONICS BUS/SWITCH.
COMM 1 STOPPED WORKING FIRST THEN STARTED WORKING. DURING THE LAST 15 MIN OF THE FLT FOLLOWING ITEMS WERE RECEIVING RED X'S: GLIDE SLOPE, GPS, COMM 1, ENG GAUGES...
action: COULD NOT DUPLICATE COMPLAINT. INSPECTED PFD AND MFD CONNECTORS. PERFORMED WIGGLE TEST ON INSTRUMENT PANEL HARNESS.

problem: COMM 1 STOPPED WORKING FIRST THEN STARTED WORKING. DURING THE LAST 15 MIN OF THE FLT FOLLOWING ITEMS WERE RECEIVING RED X'S: GLIDE SLOPE, GPS, COMM 1, ENG GAUGES...
action: PD CONT: ALSO THE DIAL TO CHANGE THE COMMS ON THE MFD WAS EITHER NOT WORKING OR CHANGING BY ITSELF. NO RED X'S ON THE GROUND AFTER WE LANDED.

problem: STARTER MAKES LOUD GRINDING NOISE & PROP DOESN'T TURN.
action: REMOVED & REPLACED STARTER W/ S/N H-S060680. OPS CK GOOD.

problem: AFTER LANDING, ATTEMPTED TO CONTACT GROUND USING COMM 2. GROUND COULD NOT HEAR US & WE COULD NOT HEAR GROUND UNLESS USING COMM 1.
action: CONNECTED COMM TEST EQUIPMENT TO COMM 2. CK'ED RECEIVER & TRANSMITTER OPERATION. NO PROBLEMS FOUND. CK'ED COAXIAL CONNECTIONS. CK'ED TRANSMITTED SIGNAL W/ SPECTRUM ANALYZER. COMM 2 OPERATION TESTS GOOD AT THIS TIME.

problem: AFTER LANDING, ATTEMPTED TO CONTACT GROUND USING COMM 2. GROUND COULD NOT HEAR US & WE COULD NOT HEAR GROUND UNLESS USING COMM 1.

action: REMOVED & REPLACED STARTER W/ S/N FN-0510105.
